explicit_text: My mother was Irish, and that heritage has always been a part of who I am. Growing up, I felt the influence of my Irish background alongside my German and Austrian roots. Being half Irish gave me a unique perspective and a blend of cultural traits that shaped my identity.

explicit_text: My father's family came from Austria, and they made an impressive journey by boat through the Erie Canal to northern Michigan.
